name: Exemption from U.S. Tax for Shipments to Possessions

eligibility.description: Applies to U.S. manufacturers or entities exporting goods from the U.S. mainland to specific U.S. possessions.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Articles, goods, wares, or merchandise being shipped from the United States to Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, Guam, or American Samoa are exempt from U.S. internal revenue taxes.
